# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported |
|---------|----------|
| main    | ✅        |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in this repository, **do not open a public issue**.

Please report it privately to:
- **Email:** xyq4r5ndd9@privaterelay.appleid.com
- **GitHub:** [@De-ASI-INTERFACE](https://github.com/De-ASI-INTERFACE)

Provide the following in your report:
1. Description of the vulnerability
2. Steps to reproduce
3. Potential impact (e.g., fund loss, routing exploit, API abuse, HTTP 402 bypass)
4. Suggested remediation if known

You will receive acknowledgment within **48 hours** and a resolution timeline within **7 days** for critical issues.

## Scope

In scope:
- Swap routing logic vulnerabilities
- HTTP 402 payment gate bypass
- API key or RPC endpoint exposure
- Jupiter aggregator integration exploits
- Authentication/authorization bypass

Out of scope:
- UI/UX issues unrelated to security
- Theoretical vulnerabilities without proof of concept

## Responsible Disclosure

This project follows a **90-day responsible disclosure** policy.
